panels.description: Request-generation events from Loki. Shows request id, session-first flag, message count, and sampling parameters extracted from sanitized request_json.

targets.expr: {app=~"$app", bucket="request_generation", route=~"$route"} | json | session_id=~"$session_id" | request_id=~"$request_id" | line_format "request_id={{.request_id}} first={{.session_first_request}} messages_cnt={{.messages_count}} model={{.request_json_model}} max_tokens={{.request_json_max_tokens}} max_completion_tokens={{.request_json_max_completion_tokens}} n={{.request_json_n}} temperature={{.request_json_temperature}} top_p={{.request_json_top_p}} top_k={{.request_json_top_k}} min_p={{.request_json_min_p}} seed={{.request_json_seed}} stop={{.request_json_stop}} presence_penalty={{.request_json_presence_penalty}} frequency_penalty={{.request_json_frequency_penalty}} repetition_penalty={{.request_json_repetition_penalty}} logprobs={{.request_json_logprobs}} top_logprobs={{.request_json_top_logprobs}}"

panels.title: Generation Requests

panels.description: Response-generation events from Loki. Shows terminal status, E2E, optional TTFT, response size, and extracted assistant text.

targets.expr: {app=~"$app", bucket="response_generation", route=~"$route"} | json | session_id=~"$session_id" | request_id=~"$request_id" | line_format "request_id={{.request_id}} first={{.session_first_request}} status={{.status_code}} level={{.level}} e2e={{.e2e_sec}} ttft={{.ttft_sec}} stream={{.stream}} body_bytes={{.body_bytes}} assistant_text={{.assistant_text}}"

panels.title: Generation Responses
Gateway Errors and Warnings
panels.description: Warning and error Loki events grouped in one place. Use request_id to jump into failed gateway or backend flows.

targets.expr: {app=~"$app", route=~"$route"} | json | session_id=~"$session_id" | request_id=~"$request_id" | level=~"warn|error" | line_format "bucket={{.bucket}} level={{.level}} request_id={{.request_id}} route={{.route}} status={{.status_code}} warn_reason={{.warn_reason}} error={{.error_type}} {{.error_message}}"
